Unit 3

This is where you can find the projects that I worked on throughout Unit 3.

The first task that I worked on was my mad libs assignment. Our task was to write a mad libs program that takes at least ten inputs and outputs a funny story with the text formatted correctly. Here is some sample code you can input and modify to help you.



The second task that I worked on this year was by project with Sophie which was our text table game. We worked on creating a game similar to snakes and ladders.
